content: Self-Refine’s iterative single-perspective self-feedback loop can be augmented by incorporating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or labeled data while fixing its blind spot of repeated self-confirmation bias. This hybrid approach would enable LLMs to refine outputs by both iteratively polishing from one starting point and challenging their own assumptions via contradictory alternative perspectives, all without external supervision.
